# Adaptive RL Quantization (vendored)

Upstream: [Legendarylibrorg/Adaptive-RL-Quantization](https://github.com/Legendarylibrorg/Adaptive-RL-Quantization) (MIT).

Reinforcement-learning framework for adaptive llama.cpp-style quantization with reward engineering,
simulator-first training, and optional CUDA/PyTorch or llama.cpp backends.

Seiso integrates this via `seiso/rl_quant/` and Forge job orchestration. Cite upstream using
`CITATION.cff` when publishing results.
